summary: The representatives are discussing the candidacy of Dean Verux, who has been accused by Elric Mervinger of forging private documents and attempting to murder him. The accusations come to a head as Leburn, a servant of Sean Neresta, reveals that he has recorded evidence of Dean's crimes, leading to his disqualification from the election.
key_moments: Elric Mervinger accuses Dean Verux of forgery and attempted murder
Leburn reveals recorded evidence of Dean's crimes
Dean Verux is disqualified from the election
